result: PASS — game runs 100+ turns, reaches survival victory

factionDifferentiation.detail: All AI factions use the same greedy-movement GOAP behavior. No faction-specific strategy visible. Reclaimers don't harvest more, Volt doesn't turtle, Signal doesn't swarm, Iron doesn't attack more aggressively.
factionDifferentiation.recommendation: Wire faction-specific GOAP goal weights: Reclaimers emphasize harvest, Volt emphasize build+defend, Signal emphasize scout+expand, Iron emphasize attack+conquer.

territoryDistribution.verdict: MARGINAL — territories exist but are tiny
territoryDistribution.detail: At turn 100: player 1.5%, volt 3.0%, signal 2.9%, iron 3.0%, cult 2.3%. No faction above 60% or below 1%. But total claimed territory is only ~13% — 87% unclaimed. Factions barely explore.
territoryDistribution.recommendation: Increase unit movement range or add exploration goals to GOAP. Consider fog-of-war reveal as territory claim.

cultPressure.detail: static_remnants grew to 20 units (cap) with 240 total HP. AI factions together have 14 units with 126 HP. Cult has nearly 2x the HP of all AI factions combined. Signal Choir lost 3 of 4 units (likely to cult).
cultPressure.recommendation: Reduce cult spawn rate or enforce the cap of 12 (current cap may be 20). Add GOAP goals for factions to fight cult. Balance cult_infantry HP (12) vs faction scout HP (5).

economy.detail: No faction gained or spent resources in 100 turns. Starting resources unchanged (player 15, AI factions 35 each). Harvesting system exists but units don't auto-harvest. No income from buildings.
economy.recommendation: Wire GOAP harvest goal: when worker/harvester is near salvage, queue harvest action. Wire building income: storm_transmitter should generate power, storage_hub should tick resources.

research.verdict: NOT TESTED — no research labs exist
research.detail: No faction has research labs (0 buildings built in 100 turns). Research system exists but AI never builds. Tech tree untouched.
research.recommendation: Wire GOAP build goal: when faction has enough resources, build research_lab. This will bootstrap tech progression.

victoryProgress.detail: Game reached survival victory at turn 200+ (from earlier observer test). Domination, research, economic paths show no progress due to static economy. Only survival path progresses naturally.
victoryProgress.recommendation: Once economy and building are wired, other victory paths will become viable.

combatSystem.verdict: BROKEN — attacks fail with 'target out of range'
combatSystem.detail: Turn log shows repeated 'Attack failed — target out of range'. Units attempt attacks but are never adjacent enough. combatKills = 0 for all factions despite 100 turns. Signal Choir lost 3 units — possibly to cult adjacency kills during movement, not ranged combat.
combatSystem.recommendation: Debug attack range check. Ensure GOAP move-to-attack positions units adjacent before attacking. Check if attack range = 1 (melee) and units aren't pathfinding to adjacent tiles correctly.

knownIssues: BUG: Bridge turn counter stale — React state doesn't update during synchronous advanceNTurns() loop. ECS Board.turn advances correctly but bridge.turn lags until next React render.
BUG: combatKills always 0 despite units being destroyed. Kill tracking may not be wired in attackSystem.
BUG: Attack range check too strict — 'Attack failed — target out of range' fills turn log. GOAP may not position units adjacent before queuing attacks.
BUG: Cult unit cap may be 20 instead of documented 12.
BALANCE: Player starts with 0 buildings but AI starts with 2. Player disadvantaged.
BALANCE: AI does not harvest, build, or research. All GOAP goals are movement-only.
BALANCE: Economy is completely static — no income, no spending, no growth.
